summary: auth logout must revoke EVERY persisted session source, not just the credential token fields: the on-disk cookies.json jar AND the raw Cookie header saved by 'auth import-cookies' (config.Headers["Cookie"]).
reason: Cookie-auth CLIs persist a live session three ways — credential tokens (ClearTokens), the client cookie jar (cookies.json), and the import-cookies Cookie header in config. The generated logout only cleared tokens, so both the jar and the saved header kept re-sending the old Jimmy John's session after 'Credentials cleared'. Added client.ClearCookieJar() and config.ClearSessionHeaders(); logout calls both.
